creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #7)
> I applied the patch, build with poudriere and tested ardour. This is what I get:
> 
> ld-elf.so.1:/usr/local/lib/libgdk-x11-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol:
> "g_once_init_enter_pointers"
> 
> Note that this is different from the original report.

Hi Fernando, are you sure this is somehow related to Ardour and this patch?
The library that complains is from x11-toolkits/gtk20, the symbol likely from devel/glib20 (google doesn't know it), and neither of us experienced this problem in our tests...

Could you check your installed packages, and maybe try a different application that uses /usr/local/lib/libgdk-x11-2.0.so.0?

My patch should be safe BTW, was merged upstream pretty much immediately.
